text.title: Reranking — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: Qdrant top-20 → Cohere Rerank top-5 with BGE-base fallback.

example.title: reranker.yaml for support-kb RAG
example.code:
provider: cohere model: rerank-multilingual-v3.0 top_n_input: 20 top_k_output: 5 latency_budget_ms: 350
fallback: strategy: local-bge model: BAAI/bge-reranker-base trigger: consecutive_5xx: 3 timeout_ms: 2000 degraded_flag: true
eval_evidence: set_path: evals/rerank-support-kb.jsonl sample_size: 84 precision_lift: 0.21 baseline: "hybrid retrieve top-5, no reranker" judge: ragas_context_precision
example.note: Demonstrates r1 (post-retrieval), r2 (top_n=20 well under 1000 cap), r3 (latency budget pinned), r4 (sample=84, lift=0.21 > 0.10), r5 (BGE local fallback).
